name: н•ңкөӯм–ҙ
bot_added_group: Bot has been added to this group. рҹ‘Ӣ
features_list: рҹҸ° Alliance Management вҖў Create alliances and bind groups вҖў Multi-alliance support рҹ‘Ҙ Member Management вҖў Auto member tracking (Furnace, Name, State) вҖў Bulk add/remove members вҖў Change notifications рҹҺҒ Gift Code System вҖў Automatic code redemption вҖў New code checking (5 min interval) вҖў Detailed error reports рҹ“… Attendance System вҖў Event participation tracking вҖў Attendance reports рҹ”” Event Reminders вҖў Automatic event notifications вҖў Custom time settings
add_bot_to_group: рҹ“Ң To add bot to a group:
add_bot_button: Click the button below or manually add the bot to your group.
admin_notice: вҡ пёҸ Note: Only admins can use bot commands.
help_text: рҹ“ҡ WhiteBot Command Guide в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ рҹҡҖ General /start - Start the bot /help - Show this help /setup - Setup wizard /panel - Admin control panel /language - Change your personal language /setgrouplang - Change group language /premium - Subscription and limits /support - Contact support пҝҪ Account Management /register - Register game account /delete - Delete registered account /profile - View profile /history - Player change history /checkuser [FID] - Check user by FID рҹҸ° Alliance Management /alliance - Alliance info /setupalliance - Create alliance in group /alliancetag - Change alliance tag /alliancename - Change alliance name /setgroup - Link group to alliance /getlinkcode - Discord link code /unlinkdiscord - Remove Discord link /admins - Manage admins пҝҪ Member Management /addmember [FID] - Add member /removemember [FID] - Remove member /members - View members /bulkremove - Bulk remove members рҹҺҒ Gift Codes /codes - Gift code list /usecode [CODE] - Use code for all members /addcode [CODE] - Add gift code manually пҝҪ Transfer & Game Info /transfer [state] - Kingdom transfer info /state - Server timeline and events /calc - Game calculators рҹ“… Events & Attendance /events - View events /addevent - Add event /attendance - Attendance tracking /changes - Recent changes вҡҷпёҸ Control & Tracking /startcontrol - Start auto tracking /stopcontrol - Stop auto tracking /setinterval - Set check interval /settings - Settings рҹ“Ӣ Google Forms /addform - Add auto-fill form /forms - List saved forms в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ рҹ’Ў Owner commands: /help owner

Could not connect to the game server. This is usually a temporary issue.

welcome_desc: Send automatic welcome messages to new members
send_welcome_message: Send the welcome message you want to use:
welcome_register_desc:
Register to receive automatic gift codes:

**1пёҸвғЈ** In game, tap your Avatar
**2пёҸвғЈ** Press Settings (вҡҷпёҸ) button
**3пёҸвғЈ** Copy your FID number
**4пёҸвғЈ** Type here: `/register FID`
welcome_footer: вңЁ After registration, all gift codes will be automatically applied!
welcome_find_fid: рҹ“Қ Find your FID like this:
welcome_tg_greeting:
рҹ‘Ӣ Welcome {user}!

рҹҸ° You joined **[{tag}] {name}**.

в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ
рҹ“қ **Register & Get Gift Codes!**
в”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғв”Ғ

To receive automatic gift codes, you need to register:

**How to register?**
1пёҸвғЈ In game, tap your **Avatar**
2пёҸвғЈ Press **Settings** (вҡҷпёҸ) button
3пёҸвғЈ Copy your **FID** number
4пёҸвғЈ Type here: `/register YOUR_FID`

**Example:** `/register 123456789`

вңЁ After registration, all gift codes will be automatically applied to your account!

setpremium_on_desc: рҹҹў ON вҖ” Users can see premium plans, prices and upgrade options.
setpremium_off_desc: рҹ”ҙ OFF вҖ” Users only see 'contact owner' message (no prices shown).
setpremium_when_on: When ON: /premium shows plans, prices, comparison table, upgrade buttons.
setpremium_when_off: When OFF: /premium shows usage limits only + 'contact owner' button. No prices or plans visible to users.
setpremium_assignplan_note: Owner can still assign plans manually with /assignplan in both modes.
setpremium_invalid_arg: вқҢ Invalid argument. Use: /setpremium on or /setpremium off
setpremium_already_on: в„№пёҸ Premium visibility is already ON.
setpremium_already_off: в„№пёҸ Premium visibility is already OFF.
setpremium_turned_on: вң… Premium visibility: ON Users will now see plan comparison, prices and upgrade options in /premium.
setpremium_turned_off: вң… Premium visibility: OFF Users will only see their current usage limits and a 'contact owner' button. No plan names, prices or upgrade buttons will be shown. You can still assign plans manually with /assignplan.
invalid_state_id: Invalid State ID. Please enter numbers only.
note_initial_heroes: Information about Generations for each day is now available. The list of Heroes will keep growing over time. There's a lot to do and only two hands to handle it рҹҳү
note_arena_update: Opponent pool enlarged by nearby servers.
note_sunfire_castle: Sunfire Castle becomes the battleground for state alliances. Following the election of a President, ministers can be appointed. The Sunfire Castle Battle happens on Saturday.
note_fire_crystal_1_3: Fire Crystal 1-3: Completion of the 'Road to Discovery' Monument unlocks the Fire Crystal Age, granting players at Furnace level 30 the ability to enhance their buildings further.
note_svs_koi: The events run on separate timelines. If your server is below day 80 (12 weeks) when they begin, you'll experience another HOC.
note_crystal_4_5: Fire Crystal 4-5 and Crystal laboratory unlock
note_legendary_gear: Chief Legendary Gear Unlock - try our Chief Gear Calculator.
note_war_academy: War Academy, Fire Crystal Tech and T11 Troops Unlock
note_advanced_crystal: Fire Crystal Building level 6-8 and Refined Fire Crystal Unlock

Type the message you want to send.

transfer_not_eligible_desc: Your state is not included in the transfer group for the following dates

state_too_new_or_invalid: This state is too new or invalid. It's not yet included in the transfer schedule.
transfer_schedule_info: Transfer schedule typically includes states at least 100 days old.
transfer_cost_desc: Transfer Score = Furnace + Gear + Hero + Pet + Expert power (Troop power excluded)
transfer_req_power_cap: Must not exceed the Power Cap
transfer_req_furnace: Must reach required Furnace level (varies with state age)
transfer_req_no_alliance: Must not be in any Alliance
transfer_req_no_combat: City must not be in combat
transfer_req_same_gen: Target state must have same Hero Gen and FC level
transfer_req_max_chars: Fewer than 4 characters in target state

transfer_phase2: Phase 2: Invitational Transfer (2 days) вҖ” President sends invites
transfer_phase3: Phase 3: Open Transfer (2 days) вҖ” Everyone can transfer

transfer_no_alliance: This group is not linked to an alliance
transfer_alliance_suspended_desc: This alliance has been suspended. Your bot permissions are restricted.
transfer_not_member: You are not a member of this alliance
cj_main_desc: Crazy Joe event guide вҖ” wave info, point calculator and difficulty recommendation.
cj_difficulty_desc: Higher level = more enemies but more points.
cj_warning_online: вҡ пёҸ ALL MEMBERS must be online for this wave!
cj_warning_hq: рҹҸ° HQ Defense вҖ” send reinforcements! No self-def points.
cj_points_tip: Higher level = more points but stronger enemies.
cj_recommend_tip: This is an estimate. Adjust based on your alliance strength.
cj_no_members: No registered members found in this alliance.
cj_no_alliance: Alliance not found. Use this in an alliance group.
addevent_usage: рҹ“… Add Event Notification Usage: /addevent [type] [HH:MM] [timezone] [description] {event_types} {event_list} Example: /addevent bear_trap 12:00 UTC Bear Trap starting! Timezones: UTC, Europe/Istanbul, America/New_York, etc.
eventrepeat_usage: рҹ“… Set Event Repeat Schedule Usage: /eventrepeat [ID] [days] Examples: вҖў /eventrepeat 1 daily - Every day вҖў /eventrepeat 1 mon,wed,fri - Specific days вҖў /eventrepeat 1 off - Disable repeat Days: mon, tue, wed, thu, fri, sat, sun
eventmention_usage: рҹ“ў Set Event Mention Usage: /eventmention [ID] [type] Types: вҖў none - No mention вҖў everyone - @everyone вҖў here - @here (Discord only)
transfer_update_desc: Official transfer dates have been updated!
transfer_update_check: Use /transfer [state] to see your transfer details.
transfer_update_affected: New transfer dates have been announced that include your state!
transfer_tracker_checking: Checking for new transfer sneak peeks
transfer_tracker_no_new: No new transfer sneak peeks found.
bulkadd_disabled: рҹҡ« The /bulkadd command has been disabled. Please use /addmember to add members one by one.
bulkadd_hint: Paste FIDs separated by spaces or commas. No TAG needed вҖ” alliance is auto-detected from group.
bulkadd_truncated: вҡ пёҸ Limit reached! Only first {limit} will be processed.
bear_trap_tip:
If you don't have the correct heroes, send troops with NO heroes.
It's better to send no heroes than wrong heroes.
bear_trap_recall: рҹҡЁ Remember to RECALL your troops before Bear Trap starts!
canyon_tip: Focus on rally damage. Send your strongest heroes.
foundry_tip: Coordinate with alliance for best results.
